title: Talklines/Warmlines * Hepatitis - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Talklines/Warmlines * Hepatitis 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Hepatitis Perinatal Depression Reproductive Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF HELP-4-HEP HELP4HEP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides phone-based peer support to individuals diagnosed with or exposed to hepatitis C. Support includes: help finding resources such as free or low-cost testing and treatment; financial assistance for medical care; and general information on prevention, risk factors, and additional resources. Also provides information via website and app. 1351 Cooper Road Scotch Plains, NJ 07076 Eligibility: Anyone who has been exposed to or diagnosed with the hepatitis C virus and anyone who has questions about any aspect of hepatitis C Hours: Monday-Friday 6am-6pm. Closed federal holidays. Email (877) 435-7443 Get Directions More Details No Mapping Information Available
